placeholder.title: Account Settings
placeholder.message: Account management features are coming soon.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteIntro: Deleting your account is permanent. The following data will be erased immediately and cannot be recovered:

consequence.recipes: All saved and imported recipes, including favorites.
consequence.shoppingLists: Every shopping list you created and your purchase history.
consequence.mealPlans: Your weekly meal plans and cooking history.
consequence.profile: Your profile, preferences, dietary settings, and activity log.
consequence.signIn: Your sign-in account — you will be signed out and unable to log in again.
